privileged_info_summary: The create_collection task is a synthetic automation task that requires an AI agent to create a new Collection document in Nuxeo Platform version 10.10. The collection must be named exactly '2024 Planning Documents'. The task uses Nuxeo's REST API (endpoint /api/v1/search/lang/NXQL/execute) to query and verify the collection creation via NXQL queries that search for the Collection document type with specific dc:title, ecm:isTrashed, and ecm:isVersion properties. The task operates on a default Nuxeo installation with standard credentials (Administrator/Administrator) running on port 8080/nuxeo. The verification is performed by executing an NXQL search that queries for Collection type documents matching the specified name and lifecycle state filters.
